added: Library search - Downloads and History now include inline search so saved media and past tasks are easier to filter
External player fallback - the built-in player can now hand off saved or imported media to another player more easily
Repo-safe update flavor - added a repoSafe distribution flavor that keeps yt-dlp auto-update off by default for repository-friendly builds
fixed: Targeted failure help - recovery panels now surface more useful next steps and actions for common failure patterns
Audio extraction recovery - WAV and FLAC conversions no longer receive invalid bitrate arguments
FFmpeg runtime preference - runtime setup now tries the newer linked or overlay FFmpeg before falling back to the legacy bundled binary
Player format support plumbing - more audio and video containers now get correct MIME hints, library classification, and in-app or external-open handling
improved: Recovery guidance classification - failed queue items now classify likely problems into clearer buckets
Downloads header density - compacted selection actions plus top filter and sort controls
Playback-safe video defaults - when no exact format is chosen manually, video downloads now prefer more device-friendly defaults
Brief compatibility heads-up - variable-support formats now show only a short 2-second playback notice
